accessMethods.name: MCP Integration
accessMethods.summary: Connect from any client that supports MCP.

accessMethods.name: CLI Integration
accessMethods.summary: Install, configure, and use OpenViking CLI directly from a terminal.

accessMethods.name: Agent CLI Integration
accessMethods.summary: Send setup instructions to an AI agent so it can learn and remember the CLI workflow.

accessMethods.name: API Integration
accessMethods.summary: Call OpenViking capabilities through the REST API.

accessMethods.name: SDK Integration
accessMethods.summary: Use SDK wrappers for faster and cleaner integration.

agents.name: OpenClaw
agents.summary: Plugin integration for OpenClaw as a context engine, with cross-agent memory and one-command setup through the npm helper.

agents.name: Hermes Agent
agents.summary: Hermes includes OpenViking as a native memory provider. Point Hermes to your OpenViking service to enable storage, recall, and extraction.

agents.name: Claude Code
agents.summary: Adds long-term memory to Claude Code across projects and sessions. Install once; recall and capture run automatically.

agents.name: Codex
agents.summary: Adds persistent cross-session memory to Codex through lifecycle hooks and the OpenViking MCP endpoint.

agents.name: Cursor
agents.summary: Connect Cursor through MCP to provide coding and agent-development context management.

agents.name: TRAE
agents.summary: Connect TRAE through MCP and use OpenViking for coding context, memory, and resource management.

agents.name: OpenCode
agents.summary: Provides one unified OpenCode plugin for repository context, memory tools, session sync, and automatic recall.
